response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack required. They have also demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the role.
strengths: Proven full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with AI agent development and various backend and frontend technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Less experience with Kotlin/Java compared to other technologies
Some positions held were not strictly full-stack or did not directly align with the primary stack
